overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 exploring a dimly lit underground plaza with industrial concrete architecture, neon signage, and scattered NPCs. The player character walks through the environment passing futuristic columns, graffiti-covered walls, and automated vending machines.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial underground corridor with hazard-striped columns

events.description: moving from narrow corridor into more open plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the underground corridor past industrial columns

notable_agents.action: NPC carrying large circular weight plates walking across the path

entered.detail: tall industrial support column with yellow and black hazard stripes
smooth gray concrete flooring with scattered debris and stains
fluorescent tube lights mounted on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow industrial underground corridor with distinctive yellow-black striped columns. The player walks forward past an NPC carrying weights, with fluorescent ceiling lights illuminating the concrete floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open underground plaza with neon signage and seating

events.description: entering area illuminated by red neon signage
turning right toward the concrete bench area

agents.ego_description: turning toward the right side of the plaza to explore the neon-lit area

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting on concrete bench with glowing blue shoes and white top

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading AMENDMENT with a blue arrow pointing left
checkerboard pattern tile flooring in the open plaza area
low rectangular concrete platform used for seating

segments.scene_description: The player enters a more open plaza area dominated by a bright red neon AMENDMENT sign. The flooring changes to a checkerboard tile pattern, and a concrete bench with a sitting NPC becomes the focal point as the camera turns right.

events.description: moving into narrower corridor with graffiti-covered walls

agents.ego_description: walking past the graffiti wall and observing the NPCs in the corridor

notable_agents.action: NPC with red hair and glowing red eyes standing near the wall

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
green metal trash can with an orange garbage bag
vertical metal ladder attached to the concrete wall

segments.scene_description: The player moves into a narrower corridor section featuring a prominent graffiti-covered wall on the left. A distinctive NPC with red hair and glowing red eyes stands near the wall, while a green trash can and metal ladder are visible on the right.

events.description: approaching the automated vending machine area

agents.ego_description: approaching the burrito vending machine at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: yellow and black automated food vendor with BURRITO XXX signage and menu displays
colorful promotional posters on the wall including one for Samurai
closed corrugated metal security shutter door

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a BURRITO XXX vending machine with bright yellow and black coloring. The walls feature advertisement posters, and a closed metal shutter door is visible at the end of the corridor. The player explores this dead-end area of the underground plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dimly lit underground industrial complex that shifts from narrow corridors into an open plaza before ending in a dead-end alley. It begins by moving past yellow-black striped columns and an NPC carrying weights under the glare of fluorescent ceiling lights. As the space opens up, the camera enters a plaza featuring a checkerboard tile floor and a bright red neon AMENDMENT sign, turning right toward a concrete bench where another NPC sits. The scene then narrows again into a corridor defined by a graffiti-covered wall and a red-haired NPC with glowing eyes, passing a green trash can and a metal ladder. Finally, the movement leads toward a bright yellow and black BURRITO XXX vending machine and advertisement posters, coming to a halt before a closed metal shutter door.
